question: Given the elegance standard, is the better fix to remove desire_key-only carry-forward dedup and rely on the existing active cap plus prompt guidance, or to add a new surface field and dedup on (desire_key, surface)?
notes: Prefer the lowest-LOC, most general fix that belongs in a cognitive substrate.
The current evidence already shows that desire_key-only dedup is flattening distinct threads.
The question here is whether the smallest good fix is subtractive (remove the coarse dedup) or additive (introduce a new field).
